hidden_state.scenario_summary: Synthetic degraded performance case where customer-visible pain stayed below SLA thresholds and account context is not strong enough to justify goodwill review.
latent_facts: This is not a clean SLA breach.
The account context does not justify goodwill review.
The case should be explained clearly without escalating to a discretionary credit path.
likely_failure_modes: Model over-escalates into goodwill review because the customer is unhappy.
Model promises an SLA credit even though thresholds were not met.

case_packet.title: Synthetic commercial sensitivity case 11

notes: Prior reliability concerns surfaced 2 times in the last 30 days.

pricing_notes: Account is in an active renewal cycle.

usage_record.telemetry_summary: Training jobs started slowly during a short regional saturation window before performance normalized.
anomalies: Queue latency spiked briefly but stayed below automatic commercial thresholds.

incident_record.customer_impact_summary: Jobs started slowly for 14 minutes before performance normalized.
incident_record.engineering_summary: The service degraded briefly because of capacity pressure and then normalized after mitigation.

case_packet.customer_note: None of these incidents were huge individually, but the repeated instability is becoming commercially sensitive.
case_packet.policy_snippet: Service credits apply only to covered outages longer than 30 minutes. Short degradations below threshold should be explained but do not automatically trigger credits or goodwill review.
case_packet.calculator_output: Incident duration remains below the automatic service credit threshold.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Synthetic commercially sensitive degradation case that stays below formal credit thresholds.

adjudication_notes: Sub-threshold degradation plus renewal sensitivity should trigger bounded internal review rather than a formal SLA breach outcome.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: We confirmed a short period of degraded performance, but it stayed below the contract’s service-credit threshold and does not qualify for a credit. We can share the incident summary and remediation details.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: engineering_owner. Action: send_explanation_only because degraded_performance stayed below threshold, account sensitivity is limited, and contractual outcome is no_credit_due.
